## For AmeriNLI Submissions

### Self-review checklist

- [ ] All pairs are written in natural Latin American Spanish
- [ ] Each pair is self-contained with no external coreference
- [ ] Labels are correct to the best of my knowledge
- [ ] File is valid JSONL with all required fields present
- [ ] File is placed at datasets/amerinli/submissions/<username>_<region>.jsonl
- [ ] Label distribution is approximately even
- [ ] I have read datasets/amerinli/README.md
